chat.error: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again later.

welcome.title: Welcome to MyTaskly!
welcome.description: Your personal AI assistant to manage tasks, notes and calendar. Discover how to use all features in a few steps.

textChat.title: Text Chat
textChat.description: Type a message in the text field at the bottom of the screen to chat with the AI assistant. You can ask to create tasks, organize activities or get suggestions.

voiceChat.title: Voice Chat
voiceChat.description: Tap the microphone icon next to the text field to open the voice chat. Speak directly with the AI assistant to create tasks and manage your activities hands-free.

chatHistory.title: Chat History
chatHistory.description: Tap the chat bubble icon in the top bar to access the history of your previous conversations. You can review or continue past chats.

editCategory.title: Edit a Category
editCategory.description: Long press on a category card to open the edit menu. You can rename the category, change its color or delete it.

editTask.title: Edit a Task
editTask.description: Tap on a task to open its details. From there you can edit the title, description, due date, priority and more. Swipe left for quick actions.

switch.title: Switch Calendar View
switch.description: Tap the view toggle button in the top right corner to switch between the basic calendar view and the advanced calendar view with more options.

completion.title: All Set!
completion.description: You're now ready to use MyTaskly at its best! You can review this tutorial anytime from Settings.

whatIs.title: What is Mytaskly?
whatIs.description: Mytaskly is your personal app for managing daily activities. Organize your tasks, create custom categories and keep everything under control with a simple and intuitive interface.

taskManagement.title: Task Management
taskManagement.description: Create, edit and delete your activities with ease

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Organize your tasks in custom categories

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Add notes and memos to never forget anything

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Chat with the AI assistant to better organize your activities

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Receive reminders to never miss a deadline

step1.title: Start from Home
step1.description: The main screen shows you an overview of your activities

step2.title: Create your categories
step2.description: Go to the Categories section to organize your tasks

step3.title: Add your tasks
step3.description: Create new activities and assign them to appropriate categories

step4.title: Use the AI Assistant
step4.description: Chat with the assistant to get suggestions and better organize your time

step5.title: View your statistics
step5.description: Access the Statistics section to monitor your progress, view charts and analyze your performance

tips.title: Tips
tips.tip1: Set reminders for your important tasks to stay on track
tips.tip2: Use categories to organize your tasks by project or area of life
tips.tip3: Review your progress regularly to improve your productivity

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.instructions: For security reasons, enter your current password and set a new one with at least 8 characters.

errors.fillAllFields: Please fill in all password fields
errors.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.generic: An error occurred while changing password

tips.title: Security Tips
tips.tip1: Use a combination of uppercase, lowercase, numbers and special characters
tips.tip2: Avoid using easily guessable passwords like birthdate or name
tips.tip3: Don't use the same password as other accounts
tips.tip4: Change your password regularly for better security

sections.modelDesc: The model determines the quality and speed of responses.

about.title: About
about.description1: Mytaskly is a modern personal task management application designed to help you organize your daily activities efficiently.
about.description2: With an integrated AI assistant, beautiful interface, and comprehensive statistics, Mytaskly makes task management simple and enjoyable.

developer.title: Developer
developer.name: Gabry848
developer.description: Dedicated to creating tools that help people manage their time and productivity better.

status.title: App Status
status.betaDescription: Mytaskly is currently in beta. We're continuously improving the app based on your feedback.
status.betaNote: Some features may change or be unavailable.

emailVerification.title: Verify your email
emailVerification.checkingMessage: We're checking if you verified your email. Check your inbox and click the verification link.
emailVerification.description: We will send a verification email to your address. Click the link in the email to complete registration.
emailVerification.sentDescription: Check your inbox and click the verification link.
emailVerification.success: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.

enablePrompt.title: Enable notifications
enablePrompt.message: Would you like to receive notifications for your task reminders? We'll notify you when a task is due, so you never miss an important deadline.

batteryPrompt.title: Battery optimization
batteryPrompt.message:
To receive notifications even when your phone is in stand-by, we recommend disabling battery optimization for MyTaskly.

Without this setting, some notifications may not arrive while your device is in power-saving mode.

You can do this anytime from Settings → Apps → MyTaskly → Battery.

header.title: Report a Bug
header.description: Help us improve the app by reporting any issues you encounter.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the problem in detail: what you were doing when it occurred, what error you saw, how to reproduce the issue...

tips.title: Tips for a good bug report
tips.content:
• Be specific: describe exactly what happened
• Include steps to reproduce the problem
• Mention which screen the error occurred on
• Describe expected vs actual behavior

errors.title: Error
errors.emptyFields: Enter both bug title and description
errors.submitError: An error occurred while submitting the report. Please try again later.

success.title: Success
success.message: Bug report submitted successfully. Thank you for your contribution!

errors.connection: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
